name: smooblue
description: Native multi-column Bluesky desktop client. Rust + Dioxus.

scripts.version: changeset version && node scripts/sync-cargo-version.mjs && git add Cargo.toml Cargo.lock
scripts.release: echo 'Releases are automated — see AGENTS.md "Versioning — changesets" or just merge the open "Release" PR. Manual escape hatch: scripts/release.sh' && exit 1
